prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-UTGCFGM15B15I-15X15-CHRCL Product Type: ART_AND_CRAFT_SUPPLY Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Universal Tool Graphite Crucible for Melting Silver and Gold (1, 1.75" x 1.75") Description: This compact graphite crucible is perfect for working with small samples of precious metals such as gold, silver, aluminum, copper and brass. The Universal Tool graphite high-purity crucible has high corrosion and high impact resistance that prepares it for a long working life in your lab, workshop or studio; featuring excellent thermal conductivity and temperature resistance, this graphite crucible is a reliable melting tool when working with gold, silver, platinum, brass and other alloys.

Crucibles can come in handy for a number of hobby projects, including jewelry making, metalworking and gold prospecting. Just add your metal in, melt it and get to work.

Whether used for metallurgy, metal casting, calcining, laboratory testing, gold prospecting or melting precious metals for jewelry making and design, this graphite crucible is a multi-disciplinary tool that can be used across a wide range of industries and hobbies.

Store in dry place when not in use; important to thoroughly dry after use if graphite crucible becomes wet. Search Terms: industrial science lab supplies crucible holder ceramic alumina smelting pot raw metals smelting goldsmith tools crucible melting pot jewelry making hot melt casting alloys compounds supplies Features: - Made from graphite featuring excellent thermal conductivity and temperature resistance - Size: 1.75" x 1.75" | 1.75" Deep - Melts Precious Metals Including Gold & Silver - Ideal for Jewelry Making, Gold Prospecting & Metalworking - Weight: .16 lbs | 2.568 oz === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool Graphite Crucible 1.75" x 1.75" Gold Silver

openai.item_name: Universal Tool Graphite Crucible for Melting Silver and Gold

tokens.name: Graphite Crucible for Melting Silver and Gold

anthropic.title_differentiation: High-Purity Graphite, Melts Gold And Silver, Jewelry Making, Metalworking, Excellent Thermal Conductivity, Laboratory Grade

openai.title_differentiation: High Purity Graphite, Excellent Thermal Conductivity, Temperature Resistant, Ideal For Jewelry Making And Metal Casting
